description: Prisma schema, client, and migrations for Genfeed PostgreSQL
name: @genfeedai/prisma

scripts.check:model-metadata: node scripts/generate-model-metadata.mjs && bunx biome check --write src/enum-field-map.ts && git diff --exit-code src/enum-field-map.ts
scripts.db:generate: prisma generate && node scripts/generate-model-metadata.mjs && bunx biome check --write src/enum-field-map.ts
